titleStmt.title: SII 38.468: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 468. (A.R. No. 468 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north wall, maṇḍapa infront of the central shrine, of Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakkaravarttin Rājarāja [III] Year 28 Āṉi, 1244 A.D.

summary.p: Records the gift of 2060 kāśu which was deposited in the temple treasury, by Pāḷḷiāḻvī, wife of Śāttaṅkuḍaiyāṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalamudu-uḍaiyāṉ and her younger sister Tirumagaliyaṅkoṇḍāḷ, for burning two perpetual lamps before the deity. It is also stated that these lamps were to be burnt, out of the interest of the endowed amount.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉacakkaravattika
kaḷ śrī �ja�jaRead rājarājatevaṟku yāṇ
ṭu 2 10 8 Āvatu Āṉimātattu cātta
ṅkuṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamu
tuṭaiyāṉ pāriyai paḷḷiyāḻ
viyum Ivaḷtaṅkai tirumakali
yaṅ koṇṭāḷum tirumuṉpu EThere is stroke over the letter ‘e’ which may be iṅnored.riya
vaitta cantiviḷakku Iraṇṭukku
m policai koṇṭu Erikka cipa
ṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa kācu Iraṇ
ṭāyirattuaṟupatu Ikkācil po
licaiy koṇṭu cantirātitta
varai Erikka kaṭavatākaBelow this a line which runs tevar eriyak kaṭava
Digital edition of SII 38.468 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
